item.title: Qatar says Iran didn’t warn of missile attacks, no comms with Tehran
item.description:
Source: Al Jazeera (Global)
Qatar's Ministry of Foreign Affairs says there is currently no communication between Doha and Tehran.
Matched: ministry(+2), war(+3), ai(+3)

item.title: Maritime insurers cancel war risk cover in Gulf: Will it spike energy cost?
item.description:
Source: Al Jazeera (Global)
Insurers announced they were cancelling war risk coverage after the IRGC said the Strait of Hormuz was 'closed'.
Matched: war(+3), economy(+2), ai(+3)

item.title: UN chief warns of Israeli-made humanitarian crisis in Gaza amid war on Iran
item.description:
Source: Al Jazeera (Global)
Crossings have been shut since Saturday as the displaced population of Gaza remains dependent on humanitarian aid.
Matched: war(+3), ai(+3)

item.title: Iran mourns 165 girls, staff killed in school strike during US-Israel war
item.description:
Source: Al Jazeera (Global)
Attack in southern Iran that hit civilians was the deadliest of the US-Israeli war against Tehran so far.
Matched: war(+3), ai(+3)

item.title: ‘Trump didn’t follow legal proceedings to launch this war’
item.description:
Source: Al Jazeera (Global)
'Trump left all options open for when he would be bored with this to decide it's done and find a way to declare victory'
Matched: war(+3), launch(+2)

item.title: How Russia could benefit from the US-Israeli war on Iran
item.description:
Source: Al Jazeera (Global)
A protracted conflict in the Middle East could help Russia's war effort in Ukraine.
Matched: war(+3), ai(+3)

item.title: US claims destroyed IRGC command centre, more Israel attacks on Tehran
item.description:
Source: Al Jazeera (Global)
The US Central Command (CENTCOM) says it destroyed air defence installations as well as missile and drone launch sites.
Matched: ai(+3), launch(+2)

item.title: US sanctions Rwandan army and top officials for supporting M23 in DRC
item.description:
Source: Al Jazeera (Global)
Kinshasa welcomed the sanctions while Kigali said the US move 'unjustly' targets Rwanda.
Matched: sanctions(+2), ai(+3)

item.title: Trump admin offers scant evidence on Iranian threat in ‘America First’ war
item.description:
Source: Al Jazeera (Global)
War powers legislation talks reignite as Democrats push back on Trump's justification for 'preemptive' strikes on Iran.
Matched: war(+3)

item.title: T20 World Cup teams stuck in India because of Middle East travel chaos
item.description:
Source: Al Jazeera (Global)
West Indies and Zimbabwe remain in India, along with the semifinalists at the India and Sri Lanka-cohosted World Cup.
Matched: ai(+3)

item.title: Dubai hotel guests shelter in car park as Iran attacks
item.description:
Source: Al Jazeera (Global)
Dubai hotel guests were evacuated to a basement car park after Iranian missiles struck UAE targets.
Matched: ai(+3)

item.title: India, Europe feel fuel crunch as Gulf gas supplies disrupted amid war
item.description:
Source: Al Jazeera (Global)
India and Europe bear the brunt of soaring prices as Qatar halts its liquefied natural gas production.
Matched: war(+3)

item.title: The aftermath of ongoing Israeli and US strikes on Iran’s capital, Tehran
item.description:
Source: Al Jazeera (Global)
US-Israeli strikes on Iran kill almost 800 people as blasts hit Tehran and other cities over four days of war.
Matched: war(+3)

item.title: Iran holds mass funeral for girls, staff killed in US-Israel school attack
item.description:
Source: Al Jazeera (Global)
Thousands gather in Minab for a mass funeral, chanting against the US and Israel after the school bombing.
Matched: ai(+3)

item.title: Video: Top Democrat says there was no imminent threat to the US from Iran
item.description:
Source: Al Jazeera (Global)
US Democratic senator Mark Warner says there was no “imminent threat” from Iran to the US.
Matched: war(+3)

item.title: Israeli strikes in Beirut as Hezbollah launches drones at Israel
item.description:
Source: Al Jazeera (Global)
Clouds of smoke rose over Beirut’s southern suburbs as Israel escalated its bombardment of the Lebanese capital.
Matched: launch(+2)

item.title: Real Madrid defeated by Getafe to fall four points behind Barca in La Liga
item.description:
Source: Al Jazeera (Global)
Satriano's superb volley gives the visitors a 1-0 win at the Santiago Bernabeu as Real miss injured forward Mbappe.
Matched: war(+3)

item.title: South Africa vs New Zealand – T20 World Cup semifinal: Teams, form, stream
item.description:
Source: Al Jazeera (Global)
The unbeaten Proteas face the challenge of an allround talented New Zealand side in the first semifinal on Wednesday.

item.title: Thousands flee to Syria over Israeli attacks in Lebanon
item.description:
Source: Al Jazeera (Global)
Israel’s attacks in Lebanon have triggered a new wave of displacement to Syria.

item.title: FIFA World Cup 2026 ticket frenzy unfolds amid global unrest
item.description:
Source: Al Jazeera (Global)
Demand so high that tickets are oversubscribed more than 30 times as pricing and global unrest now in focus.

item.title: US and Israeli attacks on Iran prompt worldwide protests
item.description:
Source: Al Jazeera (Global)
US and Israeli strikes on Iran have triggered protests worldwide.

item.title: Hillary Clinton walks out of Epstein deposition after photo leak
item.description:
Source: Al Jazeera (Global)
Newly released video shows the moment Hillary Clinton walks out of Epstein deposition following photo leak.

item.title: Could the US run low on weapons for its assault on Iran?
item.description:
Source: Al Jazeera (Global)
Analysts say the US could run low on vital interceptor missiles within weeks.

item.title: US Speaker says US had to attack Iran after Israel did
item.description:
Source: Al Jazeera (Global)
Senior US Republican Mike Johnson told reporters the US had to attack Iran to protect US interests.
